message:
test: Add E2E test infrastructure with Playwright

Set up end-to-end testing framework with Playwright configuration
and test suite scaffolding.

- Create tests/e2e/ directory structure
- Add tests/tsconfig.json for test compilation
- Update tests/package.json with Playwright deps

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,18 @@
   "name": "cass-tests",
   "private": true,
   "type": "module",
+  "scripts": {
+    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
+    "test:e2e:headed": "playwright test --headed",
+    "test:e2e:chromium": "playwright test --project=chromium",
+    "test:e2e:firefox": "playwright test --project=firefox",
+    "test:e2e:webkit": "playwright test --project=webkit",
+    "test:e2e:debug": "playwright test --debug",
+    "report": "playwright show-report e2e-report"
+  },
   "devDependencies": {
-    "@playwright/test": "^1.50.0"
+    "@playwright/test": "^1.50.0",
+    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
+    "typescript": "^5.7.0"
   }
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    "target": "ESNext",
+    "module": "ESNext",
+    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
+    "strict": true,
+    "esModuleInterop": true,
+    "skipLibCheck": true,
+    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
+    "outDir": "./dist",
+    "rootDir": "./e2e",
+    "declaration": false,
+    "noEmit": true,
+    "resolveJsonModule": true
+  },
+  "include": ["e2e/**/*.ts", "playwright.config.ts"],
+  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
+}
